title: Nutty Velvety Italian Courgette Stir-fry
description: This festive Italian (Neapolitan) dish features courgettes kneaded with a velvety nuttiness and vegan-friendly for a satisfying snack.
instructions: Wash the courgettes thoroughly. Slice them into thin rounds.
In a mixing bowl, combine almond butter, watermelon basil pesto, vegan cream cheese, olive oil, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to form a creamy sauce.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the sliced courgettes to the pan.
Pour in the sauce mixture over the courgettes. Stir gently until the courgettes are evenly coated and heated through.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes, or until the courgettes turn golden brown on the edges and they’re tender.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
